use_cases: Trigger form submissions with customizable variants for primary, secondary, and destructive actions
Navigate users between pages or sections with link-styled buttons
Provide icon-only buttons for compact toolbars and action menus
Enable disabled states for inactive form controls pending validation
Render polymorphic components using the asChild pattern for flexible composition
ai_summary: A reusable Button component with CVA-based variants for styling and sizes. Supports multiple visual states including default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, and link styles. Includes polymorphic rendering via asChild prop, disabled states, and accessibility features like focus-visible outlines. Designed for desktop and mobile platforms with Tailwind CSS utility classes.
